mission.title: containerd: Shim pluggable logging

resolution.summary:
Backport of for the release/1.2 branch

first commit didn't apply clean due to https://github.com/containerd/containerd/pull/3085 not being in the 1.2 branch
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
A `logging` package has been created to assist log developers create
logging plugins for containerd.

This uses a URI based approach for logging drivers that can be expanded
in the future.

Supported URI scheme's are:

* binary
* fifo
* file

You can pass the log url via ctr on the command line:
